_note: Single source of truth for all role data. Ministry area keys must match ministry-routing.json exactly. Fields ageRequirement, timeBeforeServing, d2rRequired, and onboarding are sourced from the Serving Team Onboarding Processes doc; rhythms/commitments are kept in sync with the ServeFinder Source of Truth spreadsheet (Sheet 2).

ministryAreas.label: First Impressions
ministryAreas.description: Be the first face someone sees on Sunday — helping guests feel genuinely welcomed from the parking lot to their seat.

roles.label: Welcome & Greeter
roles.description: Be the first face someone sees on Sunday — making guests feel genuinely seen and at home.
roles.ageRequirement: Middle school and up (Welcome Desk: adults, unless a lead asks you to train there)
roles.onboarding: Express interest with Kelley Ament, talk with Kelley, fill out the Serving Availability Form, then shadow on a Sunday morning.

roles.label: Café Team Member
roles.description: Keep the café running and create a space where conversations happen between services.
roles.onboarding: Express interest with Kelley Ament, talk with Kelley, fill out the Serving Availability Form, then shadow on a Sunday morning.

roles.label: Parking Team Member
roles.description: Help guests feel taken care of from the moment they arrive — before they ever walk through the door.
roles.ageRequirement: 16+ with parental consent (no consent needed once 18)
roles.onboarding: Express interest with Kelley Ament, talk with Kelley, fill out the Serving Availability Form, then shadow on a Sunday morning.

roles.label: Usher
roles.description: Help people find their seats and navigate the auditorium during services.
roles.onboarding: Express interest with Kelley Ament, talk with Kelley, fill out the Serving Availability Form, then shadow on a Sunday morning.
roles.notes: Added — confirm with Kelley whether this should be active.

roles.label: Shuttle Bus Driver/Helper
roles.description: Help connect guests from offsite parking to the building on Sunday mornings.
roles.onboarding: Express interest with Kelley Ament, talk with Kelley, fill out the Serving Availability Form, then shadow on a Sunday morning.

ministryAreas.label: Worship
ministryAreas.description: Lead the congregation in worship through music and song.

roles.label: Worship Vocalist
roles.description: Lead the congregation in worship through your voice as part of the weekly worship team.
roles.onboarding: Meet with Nate Siecinski and try out by showing your skill set.

roles.label: Worship Instrumentalist
roles.description: Play guitar, drums, keys, bass, or another instrument as part of the weekly worship team.
roles.onboarding: Meet with Nate Siecinski and try out by showing your skill set.

ministryAreas.label: Production
ministryAreas.description: Run the technical side of Sunday services — sound, video, and livestream.

roles.label: Audio Operator
roles.description: Run front-of-house or monitor audio to ensure every service sounds clear and distraction-free.
roles.onboarding: Shadow a current team member or complete training before serving. If you're in Youth, serving Production at Youth on Wednesdays first is preferred; jumping in from scratch usually begins as a Stage Assistant.

roles.label: Slides Operator
roles.description: Advance lyrics, sermon slides, and service elements so people can follow along.
roles.onboarding: Shadow a current team member or complete training before serving.

roles.label: Livestream & Video Operator
roles.description: Run cameras or manage the livestream so people watching online feel like they're right there with us.
roles.onboarding: Shadow a current team member or complete training before serving.

ministryAreas.label: Creative & Communications
ministryAreas.description: Tell the 2Rivers story through photography, video, and social media.

roles.label: Photographer
roles.description: Capture real moments that help tell the story of what God is doing at 2Rivers.
roles.commitment: Recurring Sunday rhythm 1–2x/month, plus sign-ups for big events
roles.onboarding: Talk with Nate McConnaughhay, shadow on a Sunday, then define your first project and serving rhythm.

roles.label: Social & Video Content Creator
roles.description: Create content for social media, video, and digital platforms that points people toward Jesus.
roles.onboarding: Talk with Nate McConnaughhay, shadow on a Sunday, then define your first project and serving rhythm.

roles.label: Online Host
roles.description: Welcome and engage people watching online, helping them feel seen and connected during the service.
roles.onboarding: Talk with Nate McConnaughhay, shadow on a Sunday, then define your first project and serving rhythm.
roles.notes: From onboarding doc — confirm public listing with Nate Mac.

roles.label: Graphics / Web / Video
roles.description: Create graphics, web, and video assets that help tell the 2Rivers story.
roles.onboarding: Talk with Nate McConnaughhay, shadow on a Sunday, then define your first project and serving rhythm.
roles.notes: From onboarding doc — confirm public listing with Nate Mac. Preferred: experience in their field.

ministryAreas.label: 2Rivers Kids
ministryAreas.description: Help kids encounter Jesus in a safe, fun environment every Sunday.

roles.label: Kids Check-In Host
roles.description: Help families start Sunday feeling calm, welcomed, and confident before dropping their kids off.
roles.onboarding: Talk to Ashley Kluner, fill out the Serving Availability Form, then meet/observe on a Sunday morning.

roles.label: Kids Classroom Helper
roles.description: Support the classroom lead so every kid feels safe, included, and cared for.
roles.onboarding: Talk to Ashley Kluner, fill out the Serving Availability Form, then meet/observe on a Sunday morning.

ministryAreas.label: 2Rivers Youth
ministryAreas.description: Invest in middle and high school students as a trusted adult.

roles.label: Student Small Group Leader
roles.description: Build consistent relationships with middle or high school students as a trusted adult.
roles.onboarding: Connect with the Youth team to get started.
roles.notes: Co-led by Daniel Ballard & Brady James. Background check required.

ministryAreas.label: Outreach & Missions
ministryAreas.description: Serve our city and care for people in and around 2Rivers.

roles.label: Missions Interest
roles.description: Interested in local and global mission? Let us know — we'd love to connect you with what God is doing beyond Sunday.
roles.notes: Soft expression of interest, not a structured role yet. Routes to Lillian.

roles.label: Care Team Volunteer
roles.description: Help meet real, practical needs in the lives of people in and around 2Rivers.

ministryAreas.label: Admin / General
ministryAreas.description: Support the church behind the scenes — safety, operations, and general serving.

roles.label: Safety Team Member
roles.description: Serve discreetly to help ensure 2Rivers is a safe place for everyone who walks through our doors.
roles.commitment: Sunday mornings, Wednesday nights (Youth), and special events
roles.timeBeforeServing: Serve in First Impressions or another ministry for at least 6 months
roles.onboarding: Talk to Chris Boaz, shadow a current team member, and attend at least 2 quarterly training sessions.
roles.notes: Team led by Chris Boaz. Routing stays with Lillian Good (Admin) to forward to Chris. Background check required. Preferred: Military/Law Enforcement/Security/EMS experience, 21+, CCW training & certification. Staff-referral — confirm if publicly listed.

ministryAreas.label: Maintenance
ministryAreas.description: Help care for the 2Rivers building and grounds — and jump in on other needs as they arise.

roles.label: Maintenance Team Member
roles.description: Help keep the 2Rivers building and grounds in great shape through monthly workdays — and jump in on other needs as they arise, as your time allows.
roles.commitment: Monthly — first Saturday of the month; plus other needs as they arise, as time allows
roles.ageRequirement: 16+ (a parent must be present if younger)
roles.onboarding: Email John Weber.

ministryAreas.label: Prayer Team
ministryAreas.description: Cover our church, services, and people in prayer on Sundays and throughout the week.

roles.label: Prayer Team Member
roles.description: Cover our church, services, and people in prayer — on Sunday mornings and throughout the week.
roles.commitment: Sunday mornings and throughout the week
roles.onboarding: Meet with Will Good or Felieta Boaz, then shadow a current team member.

ministryAreas.label: Hospitality
ministryAreas.description: Help our guests and teams feel cared for at special events through food and hospitality.

roles.label: Hospitality Team Member
roles.description: Help create a warm, welcoming environment at special events through food and hospitality.
roles.onboarding: Connect with Emily James.

ministryAreas.label: Babysitting
ministryAreas.description: Provide childcare so parents can serve, attend events, and connect.

roles.label: Babysitter
roles.description: Care for children during special events and gatherings so parents can attend and connect.
roles.onboarding: Connect with Katie Bynum.

ministryAreas.label: Connect Group Leaders
ministryAreas.description: Lead a home team / connect group, building community and discipleship beyond Sunday.

roles.label: Connect Group Leader
roles.description: Open your home or a space to lead a group where people build real community and grow in their faith.
roles.commitment: As needed, based on the group's schedule and needs
roles.onboarding: Interview with Brandon Johnson; training as needed based on the interview.
roles.notes: Background check required if children are in the home team / connect group. Must agree to the Connect Leader Lifestyle Agreement. Preferred: has been in a home team before and has served elsewhere at church first.
